hook: POV: AI writes your texts and she actually replies.

messages.text: hey what are you up to this weekend
was thinking we could grab coffee or something

conversation.context: Guy from class asked you out

ai_replies.analysis: He's making a casual coffee invitation - a low-pressure first move that shows genuine interest without being too forward.

replies.text: Coffee sounds good, but fair warning - I'm way more interesting after my second cup ☕
I'm down, send me some time options that work for you.
Only if you promise the conversation is better than whatever's happening in class.
